list.name: currency
list.label: Currency
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT currency FROM finance.fin_mv_monthly_by_category ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT month AS "time", currency AS metric, sum(spent) AS spent FROM finance.fin_mv_monthly_by_category WHERE category_kind = 'expense' AND ('${currency}' = '$__all' OR currency = '${currency}') GROUP BY month, currency ORDER BY month

SELECT category_name AS category, sum(spent) AS spent FROM finance.fin_mv_monthly_by_category WHERE category_kind = 'expense' AND month = date_trunc('month', now())::date AND ('${currency}' = '$__all' OR currency = '${currency}') GROUP BY category_name HAVING sum(spent) > 0 ORDER BY spent DESC
SELECT account_name AS account, currency, balance FROM finance.fin_mv_account_balance WHERE NOT archived AND ('${currency}' = '$__all' OR currency = '${currency}') ORDER BY balance DESC

SELECT c.name AS category, b.currency, b.limit_amount AS budget, COALESCE(m.spent, 0) AS spent, b.limit_amount - COALESCE(m.spent, 0) AS remaining FROM finance.fin_budget b JOIN finance.fin_category c ON c.id = b.category_id LEFT JOIN finance.fin_mv_monthly_by_category m ON m.category_id = b.category_id AND m.month = date_trunc('month', now())::date AND m.currency = b.currency WHERE b.period = 'month' AND (b.valid_from IS NULL OR b.valid_from <= now()) AND (b.valid_to IS NULL OR b.valid_to >= now()) AND ('${currency}' = '$__all' OR b.currency = '${currency}') ORDER BY remaining ASC
